problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: If Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure is applied to universe, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
